---
title: "CV"
description: "Curriculum vitae"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="cv-actions">
  <a href="cv-gonzalo-llamosas.pdf" download class="cv-download-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download PDF
  </a>
  <a href="cv-gonzalo-llamosas.pdf" target="_blank" class="cv-fullscreen-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-arrows-fullscreen"></i> Open in new tab
  </a>
</div>

<div class="cv-viewer">
  <object data="cv-gonzalo-llamosas.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="100%">
    <p>Your browser does not support embedded PDFs.
       <a href="cv-gonzalo-llamosas.pdf">Download the CV</a> instead.</p>
  </object>
</div>
```
